newsapp.management.commands package¶

Submodules¶

newsapp.management.commands.seed_data module¶

Management command: seed_data

Creates sample users, publishers, articles, and newsletters for development.

Usage:

python manage.py seed_data

class newsapp.management.commands.seed_data.Command(stdout=None, stderr=None, no_color=False, force_color=False)¶

Bases: BaseCommand

handle(*args, **options)¶

The actual logic of the command. Subclasses must implement this method.

help = 'Seed the database with sample data for development'¶
